security_review.trust_boundary_consistency: Uniform: single assertDocWriteAccess seam, shared oracle-parity 404 (PAGE_NOT_FOUND_MESSAGE), breadcrumb chain truncation on first gated ancestor, diff size cap before O(m*n) allocation.

follow_up_feature_requests: Refresh the global web-shell to Milestone 5: update apps/web/app/layout.tsx (brand eyebrow 'Milestone 4 Content Platform' line 29, metadata.description line 14, footer line 46) and the docs/features/web-shell.md 'Shared shell' section (currently 'Milestone 3 Content Platform', lines 13-17) so no stale Milestone 3/4 labels remain; next build and lint pass. Consider a milestone-agnostic shell label so future milestones need no layout edit. Distinct from ST-12, which only refreshed page.tsx and was correctly not auto-fixed (outside every subtask's allowed files).

Optional low-priority doc top-up: extend the docs/features/authorization.md assertDocWriteAccess row to enumerate all gated write routes (rename, delete, rollback, lock acquire/release), not just create/edit.
notes: Stale global shell milestone label in layout.tsx and web-shell.md (out-of-plan-scope; actionable -> follow-up #1; cosmetic, NOTE severity).
authorization.md gate table lists only the two create/edit write routes though the same gate also guards rename/delete/rollback/lock (incomplete, not wrong).
DocsTreeItem.hasChildren is hardcoded false; no caller populates it; no plan AC requires it.

Carried-over informational items (verified non-blocking): docs integration suites DB-gated via SFUS_DB_INTEGRATION=1; rollback mid-transaction-failure proof inferred, not dedicated; DocsPageShape.parentId exposes a gated parent's opaque UUID but no public id-based lookup exists; cross-parent move/reparent deferred per plan; write controllers pass literal 'site' scope to assertDocWriteAccess (correct for M5, no project docs).
